name: vibe-ux
description: Vibe UX planning skill pack for taking a new app or web product from idea brainstorming to benchmark research, user flows, brand voice, design brand fitting, and PRD.

interface.shortDescription: Plan new app and web products from idea to PRD.
interface.longDescription: Vibe UX bundles a staged product planning workflow for new app and web ideas: brainstorming, benchmark research, user-flow generation, brand voice, design-system brand fitting, and PRD synthesis.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me plan a new app or web service with the Vibe UX workflow.
